non_event_rows: 1 log-show summary row ({count, finished}) + 3-line footer naming the source archive
capture_tool: log collect (on-device archive pull over USB) + log show --style ndjson with channel predicate
source_archive: /Volumes/RoadtripCapture/iphone-trip.logarchive (per file footer; encrypted volume per checklist)
redaction: dan, 2026-06-12: mid-trip interval only (I-75 through Appalachia); departure and arrival excluded by design. Measured at ingestion: 0 coordinates, 0 BSSIDs, 0 SSIDs in the clear; 4 fields carry the OS's own <private> masking.
selection_method: RESOLVED (dan, 2026-06-12): pure time slicing, NO row sampling — `log show <archive> --start '2026-06-07 12:00:00' --end '2026-06-07 18:00:00' --style ndjson --predicate 'process == locationd OR subsystem == com.apple.CoreLocation OR subsystem BEGINSWITH com.apple.wifi OR subsystem CONTAINS[c] timesync OR subsystem CONTAINS[c] CommCenter'`. Within these channels the cadence is the device's own; gap analysis is legitimate evidence. Note: slice requested from 12:00 but first event is 14:22:56 — the queried channels were genuinely empty for 2.4h.
